entries.claim: The Android worker accepts only bounded job_id/kind input and executes notification, device snapshot, encrypted bootstrap, and native run in that order.
entries.evidence: Android unit suite passed; injected controller recorded foreground, snapshot, start, run order.

entries.claim: Notification denial stops before device snapshot and native startup and does not create an automatic retry loop.
entries.evidence: The injected foreground controller returns false; snapshot and native event lists remain empty and the result code is notifications_required.

entries.claim: Only exact successful queue-producing POST routes reconcile the Rust mobile-job plan.
entries.evidence: The policy accepts backup, restore, and agent confirm with 2xx only; near-match, GET, external, and error paths are rejected.

entries.claim: Default-off recovery hooks are bounded and absent from the separately rebuilt default APK.
entries.command: cargo remote -c -- test -p isyncyou-app-host --features mobile-job-device-test-hooks mobile_job_test_hook_is_bounded -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: Hook and default APKs were clean-built separately; default strings scan is clean and hashes are recorded.

entries.claim: The device-state probe writes a bounded snapshot and restores state through an outer cleanup path.
entries.evidence: Probe unit tests passed; Pixel snapshot and restore passed. Validated network-loss was conservatively skipped because the device retained VALIDATED.
